status: CONFIRMED-IN-CODE 2026-07-19 (single benefitCategory case->claim->one recordUsage; decision memo notes/SCN-OBS-01_DECISION.md recommends Option B sign-off + direct-claim workaround — AWAITING sponsor sign-off)
pre_state: Case opened INPATIENT; Boda needs ambulance/surgical/inpatient/rehab allocated line-by-line

status: FIXED-VERIFIED 2026-07-19 (fix/inpatient-slice-case-pa 3f655ed; read-through effectivePreauthWhere + in-tx re-read; live VM proof: Phase A no-PA BLOCKED, Phase B case-PA APPROVED 1.45M, hold credited 150k residual, PA partial-consume caseId intact — evidence/IPL-PA-01_fix_proof.txt)
pre_state: Slice S1 cut (8 lines incl. CT-HEAD which contract flags requiresPreauth)
exact_input: Adjudicate the interim slice S1 (ClaimDecisionService.decide APPROVED)
expected_result: Interim slice adjudicates; PA-required line satisfied by the case's PA/GOP; case PA hold credited to the slice (§11.5)
expectation_source: Plan §11.5 (slice consumes case hold); design brief §2.3/§2.4; CON-09
actual_result: BLOCKED: decide throws 'Contract PC-UAT-IP-2026 requires pre-authorization for: CT-HEAD. Link an approved PA to this claim.' The PA-check reads claim.preauths (the SLICE's own PAs) which is ALWAYS EMPTY for a slice — attachPreauth links PAs to the CASE (caseId), and cutInterimSlice deliberately does NOT re-point case PAs to slices (design §2.4; only closeAndFile re-points to the FINAL claim). So (a) any PA-required contract line on an interim slice cannot be approved via the interim path, and (b) case PA/GOP holds are NOT credited to interim slices (creditPreauthIds=claim.preauths=empty), contradicting §11.5.
hold_delta: case PA hold not credited to slice
privacy_clinical_operational_impact: Interim settlement is undercut for PA-secured / high-cost inpatient lines (CT/MRI/surgery); PA holds may strand or slices consume raw benefit instead of the guarantee. Real interim-settlement × contract-PA gap.
evidence_refs: (uat-boda-cadence.ts phase 1 error; case.service.ts:248 attachPreauth caseId-only; claim-decision.service.ts:408-413 reads claim.preauths)
stop_decision: Continue — prove cadence on non-PA lines; this needs product fix (re-point/credit case PAs to slices)
continuation_workaround: for cadence proof, exclude PA-required lines
notes: Interim slice should honour the case's PAs: credit case PA holds to slices and satisfy PA-required lines from case.preauths, not the slice's own empty list.
